formatted_summary:
agent2 (Round 2 summarized): Angiofibroma extending to one or more paranasal sinuses is classified as Stage II according to established staging systems like Radkowski and Andrews-Fisch. This indicates progressive local spread beyond initial nasal cavity involvement without reaching skull base erosion or intracranial extension, defining Stage III. 

Final Answer
\boxed{B}

Final Answer
\boxed{B}. Answer choice: B
